title: Add minutes for the 2026-06-26 Core Maintainers meeting
body:
These are AI generated (Gemini 3.5 Thinking). I have included the full transcript as well so there is a further source of truth in the event of error in the AI summary, but it seemed reasonably accurate when I reviewed it.

#### Does this PR introduce a user-facing change?

<!--
Write `None` if there are no user-facing changes, otherwise enter your release note below.
Include "action required" if users need to take action when upgrading.
-->

```release-note
NONE
```

comments.body: Repushed to address comments. I'm OK with dropping the transcriptions in the future if there's no demand, but I'd like to include them for the first few until we have more confidence in the AI transcripts.
[NON-BLOCKING] Packit jobs failed. @containers/packit-build please check. Everyone else, feel free to ignore.
With two LGTMs I'm going to merge
